title: psacalium poculiferum
intro: Psacalium poculiferum, also known as Mexican dandelion or yerba de la reina, is a plant species native to Mexico, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and heal wounds. The health benefits of Psacalium poculiferum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Psacalium poculiferum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and respiratory problems.
